title: "b and g must be aligned" from complex group/union query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INT, value VARCHAR(50), status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO bar (id, value, status) VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE);
INSERT INTO bar (id, value, status) VALUES (2, NULL, FALSE);
SELECT COUNT(value), SUM(CASE WHEN status THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM (SELECT value, status FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL FROM bar) AS combined GROUP BY value;
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(id) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL FROM bar) AS t GROUP BY value;
key_bug_features: group by on union query with null values
